zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾海斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Hungerford於1308年之前出生在英國維爾爾海斯波利時，他的父親Walter de Hungerford III47歲，母親Maude Heytesbury33歲。他於大約1325年與Elizabeth FitzJohn在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1341年在英國維爾爾被列為coroner。他去世於1365年在英國英格蘭維爾爾海斯波利，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh-hans.Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国英格兰維爾爾海斯波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Hungerford于1308年之前出生在英国維爾爾海斯波利时，他的父亲Walter de Hungerford III47岁，母亲Maude Heytesbury33岁。他于大约1325年与Elizabeth FitzJohn在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1341年在英国維爾爾被列为coroner。他去世于1365年在英国英格兰維爾爾海斯波利，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Hungerford was born before 1308, in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, his father, Walter de Hungerford III, was 47 and his mother, Maude Heytesbury, was 33. He married Elizabeth FitzJohn about 1325, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1341, his occupation is listed as coroner in Wiltshire, England. He died in 1365, in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Hungerford est né avant 1308, à Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Hungerford III, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Maude Heytesbury, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth FitzJohn environ 1325, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1341, sa profession de son indiquée est coroner à Wiltshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1365, à Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Hungerford vor 1308 in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Hungerford III 47 und seine Mutter Maude Heytesbury 33. Er hat um 1325 in England Elizabeth FitzJohn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1341 ist sein Beruf als coroner in Wiltshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1365 in Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Hungerford è nato il prima del 1308 nel Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Walter de Hungerford III, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Maude Heytesbury, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth FitzJohn circa 1325, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1341, la sua occupazione è indicata come coroner nel Wiltshire, England. Morì nel 1365, nel Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, England.

ja.Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイア
ja.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー
ja.Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England: イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘイテスブリー
ja.Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Hungerfordが1308年以前にイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘイテスブリーで生まれた時，父Walter de Hungerford IIIは47歳，母Maude Heytesburyは33歳であった。約1325年にイギリスでElizabeth FitzJohnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1341年，イギリスウィルトシュアイアでの職業はcoronerと記録されている。彼は1365年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアヘイテスブリーで死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Hungerford(이)가 1308년 이전 영국 윌츠히르 헤이츠버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Hungerford III(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude Heytesbury(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1325년 영국에서 Elizabeth FitzJohn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1341년, 그의 직업은 영국 윌츠히르에서 coroner이었다. 그는 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 헤이츠버이에서 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

mn.Heytesbury, Wiltshire, England: Heytesbury, Wiltūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Hungerford nasceu antes 1308, em Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Hungerford III, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Maude Heytesbury, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth FitzJohn aproximadamente 1325, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1341, sua profissão aparece como coroner em Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1365, em Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Hungerford родился перед 1308 г. в местности хитсбури, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Hungerford III было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude Heytesbury, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth FitzJohn около 1325 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1341 году он работал по профессии coroner в местности уилцхир, Англия. Он умер в 1365 г. в местности хитсбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия.

sm.from about 1330 to 1334: mai le e tusa o le 1330 e o'o I le 1334

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Hungerford nació antes de 1308, en Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Hungerford III, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Maude Heytesbury, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Elizabeth FitzJohn aproximadamente 1325, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1341, su ocupación registrada era coroner en Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1365, en Heytesbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
